meaning: n.注射器,注油器,洗涤器v.注射,冲洗,灌洗
examples: As he reached over, Azrak slid a hypodermic syringe into his left arm.
He used a 5ml syringe and 22 gague need as a seeker needle.
Syringe without needle - to pick up mercury.
That we have to argue over waxing and waning...the syringe...this is incredible for both sides.
McNamee thought it may have been caused by a syringe used for injecting steroids.
